name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

(* Participants are numbered 1..N *)
Participants == 1..N

(* Coordinator is a single process *)
Coordinator == 1

(* Message types *)
Prepare == "Prepare"
VoteYes == "VoteYes"
VoteNo == "VoteNo"
Commit == "Commit"
Abort == "Abort"

(* Message structure: [sender \in Participants \cup Coordinator, receiver \in Participants \cup Coordinator, type \in {Prepare, VoteYes, VoteNo, Commit, Abort}] *)
Message == [sender \in Participants \cup Coordinator, receiver \in Participants \cup Coordinator, type \in {Prepare, VoteYes, VoteNo, Commit, Abort}]

(* All messages are stored in a sequence *)
Messages == Seq(Message)

(* Initial state: all participants are in the "Init" state, coordinator is in "Start" state, no messages *)
Init ==
  /\ participants = [p \in Participants |-> "Init"]
  /\ coordinator = "Start"
  /\ messages = <<>>

(* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
CoordinatorSendPrepare ==
  /\ coordinator = "Start"
  /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> Coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> Prepare]) \* for each participant p
  /\ coordinator' = "Waiting"
  /\ participants' = participants

(* Participant receives Prepare and votes Yes *)
ParticipantVoteYes ==
  /\ \E m \in messages : m.type = Prepare /\ m.receiver \in Participants
  /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![m.receiver] = "VotedYes"]
  /\ messages' = [m \in messages |-> m.type # Prepare]
  /\ coordinator' = coordinator

(* Participant receives Prepare and votes No *)
ParticipantVoteNo ==
  /\ \E m \in messages : m.type = Prepare /\ m.receiver \in Participants
  /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![m.receiver] = "VotedNo"]
  /\ messages' = [m \in messages |-> m.type # Prepare]
  /\ coordinator' = coordinator

(* Coordinator sends Commit to all participants *)
CoordinatorSendCommit ==
  /\ coordinator = "Waiting"
  /\ \A p \in Participants : participants[p] = "VotedYes"
  /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> Coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> Commit]) \* for each participant p
  /\ coordinator' = "Committed"
  /\ participants' = participants

(* Coordinator sends Abort to all participants *)
CoordinatorSendAbort ==
  /\ coordinator = "Waiting"
  /\ \E p \in Participants : participants[p] = "VotedNo"
  /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> Coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> Abort]) \* for each participant p
  /\ coordinator' = "Aborted"
  /\ participants' = participants

(* Participants receive Commit and transition to "Committed" *)
ParticipantReceiveCommit ==
  /\ \E m \in messages : m.type = Commit /\ m.receiver \in Participants
  /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![m.receiver] = "Committed"]
  /\ messages' = [m \in messages |-> m.type # Commit]
  /\ coordinator' = coordinator

(* Participants receive Abort and transition to "Aborted" *)
ParticipantReceiveAbort ==
  /\ \E m \in messages : m.type = Abort /\ m.receiver \in Participants
  /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![m.receiver] = "Aborted"]
  /\ messages' = [m \in messages |-> m.type # Abort]
  /\ coordinator' = coordinator

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
  \/ CoordinatorSendPrepare
  \/ ParticipantVoteYes
  \/ ParticipantVoteNo
  \/ CoordinatorSendCommit
  \/ CoordinatorSendAbort
  \/ ParticipantReceiveCommit
  \/ ParticipantReceiveAbort

(* Invariant: all participants are in the same terminal state *)
TypeOK ==
  /\ \A p \in Participants : participants[p] \in {"Committed", "Aborted"}
  /\ coordinator \in {"Start", "Waiting", "Committed", "Aborted"}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Forks: forks[i] = i if fork i is free, otherwise forks[i] = j if philosopher j holds fork i *)
(* State: state[i] = "thinking" | "hungry" | "eating" *)

Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> i]
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

CanEat(i) == forks[i] = i /\ forks[If i = 1 then N else i-1] = i

TakeForks(i) == forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![If i = 1 then N else i-1] = i]
               /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

PutForks(i) == forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![If i = 1 then N else i-1] = i]
              /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Hungry(i) == state[i] = "hungry"

Think(i) == state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "thinking"
          /\ Think(i)
        \/ /\ state[i] = "hungry"
           /\ CanEat(i)
           /\ TakeForks(i)
        \/ /\ state[i] = "eating"
           /\ PutForks(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N]
         /\ state \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
==ENDMODULE DiningPhilosophers==
====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

Producer(x) == /\ size < K
              /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = x]
              /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
              /\ size' = size + 1
              /\ head' = head

Consumer == /\ size > 0
           /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
           /\ size' = size - 1
           /\ q' = q
           /\ tail' = tail

Next == Producer(x) \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

TypeOK == /\ K \in Nat
          /\ K > 0
          /\ q \in [1..K -> Nat]
          /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ size \in 0..K

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init ==
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = NULL
  /\ state = "Follower"

Next ==
  \/ \E newTerm \in Nat :
       /\ state = "Follower"
       /\ currentTerm' = newTerm
       /\ votedFor' = NULL
       /\ state' = "Follower"
  \/ \E newTerm \in Nat :
       /\ state = "Candidate"
       /\ currentTerm' = newTerm
       /\ votedFor' = NULL
       /\ state' = "Candidate"
  \/ \E newTerm \in Nat :
       /\ state = "Leader"
       /\ currentTerm' = newTerm
       /\ votedFor' = NULL
       /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====
